headline: Nike Data Breach Lawsuit Adds Fresh Risk To Valuation And Brand Trust
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) is facing a nationwide class-action lawsuit alleging it failed to adequately protect customer data in a recent breach. Plaintiffs claim the company did not properly safeguard personally identifiable information, exposing consumers to potential misuse of their data. The lawsuit introduces a new legal and reputational risk for Nike that is separate from earnings, guidance, or valuation topics. Nike, the global sportswear and footwear company, relies heavily on its...
